title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: A video essay argues that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order after three days of availability, raising questions about whether frontier AI will remain accessible to the public or be restricted to government control. The video frames this as a precedent-setting moment for regulation of powerful AI systems.
writeup: The video reports that Anthropic shut down its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models three days after their public release, following a US government order. It frames this as a case study in government oversight of frontier AI, and the central concern is access: whether the most capable systems stay available to the public or move behind government-imposed restrictions. The takeaway is that an external order, rather than a developer decision, drove the removal, which sets a precedent for how quickly public access to frontier models can be revoked.
